sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71391" key="nwnumni/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νωνυμνί</orth> (or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νωνῠμ-νεί</orth>), <sense id="n71391.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without being named</tr_>) : c. gen., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Σαπφοῦς νώνυμος</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without naming</tr_> Sappho, i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without knowledge of</tr_> her, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.17</biblScope> </bibl> (Tull. Laur.).</sense> </entryFree>
